creations.name: Penchant Reforged

creations.summaryEn: Rework enchanting around leveling up enchantments through usage. Unofficial NeoForge port of Penchant by ThePotatoArchivist.

creations.name: Actually Multiplications
creations.summaryFr: Actually Multiplications is a compact addon for Actually mods designed to bridge the gap by adding the armor sets and tools that were "missing" from the original material tiers

creations.name: Extend: JEI Pack
creations.summaryFr: Extend: JEI Pack is a resource pack that improves the textures for the Just Enough Items mod. This resource pack increases the texture expansion to 32x32.
creations.summaryEn: Extend: JEI Pack is a resource pack that improves the textures for the Just Enough Items mod. This resource pack increases the texture expansion to 32x32.
